description.value: This spell is available to members of a specific ethinicity of nomadic people. The spell weaves shadows and colors from your family scarf into the shape of legendary characters from your people’s folktales. This spell functions as shadow conjuration emulating summon monster I, except as noted here. You can summon only one copy of the same character at the same time, even with multiple castings of this spell. The shadow creatures are 40% real and are drawn from the list below. Freelance thief Fey giant toad Con artist Carousing champion Evasive slip Bearded devil Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Campaign Setting: Inner Sea Races Â© 2015, Paizo Publishing, LLC; Authors: Benjamin Bruck, Ross Byers, John Compton, Adam Daigle, Crystal Frasier, Matthew Goodall, Alex Greenshields, James Jacobs, Amanda Hamon Kunz, Ron Lundeen, Rob McCreary, Jessica Price, David N. Ross, Owen K.C. Stephens, James L. Sutter, Russ Taylor, and Jerome Virnich.
